ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game variant */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the poker game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "power_poker" INTEGER /* Indicates if Power Poker is available */,
  "multi_play" INTEGER /* Indicates if multi-play option is available */,
  "pay_table" TEXT /* Payout structure of the game as a string */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Expected return rate for the game */,
  "live_game" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is played live */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed */,
  "game_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the game software */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered */,
  "total_wins" REAL /* Total winnings accumulated by the player */,
  "total_losses" REAL /* Total losses incurred by the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Player's country of residence */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's account */,
  "vip_level" INTEGER /* Player's VIP level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player participating in the session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played during the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "session_winnings" REAL /* Total winnings from the session */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount bet during the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payouts" (
  "payout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payout configuration */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the payout */,
  "payout_description" TEXT /* Description of the payout structure */,
  "multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier used for payouts */,
  "hand_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the hand for the payout */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of achieving the hand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payouts_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game setting entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game these settings apply to */,
  "min_bet" REAL /* Minimum bet allowed for the game */,
  "max_bet" REAL /* Maximum bet allowed for the game */,
  "default_bet" REAL /* Default bet amount for the game */,
  "auto_play" INTEGER /* Indicates if auto-play is enabled */,
  "sound_settings" TEXT /* Sound settings */,
  "graphics_quality" TEXT /* Quality of graphics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_settings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
